_publications._publicationTitle: Chromosome 8 gain is associated with high-grade transformation in MPNST
_publications._context: WU-356 PDX established from primary mediastinal NF1-MPNST; characterized for chromosome 8q gain; one of 8 NF1-MPNST PDX lines

_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology
_publications._fundingAgency: NTAP; NCI; Department of Defense CDMRP
_publications._context: WU-356 PDX assembled into 3D microtissues; classified as unusable (<50% viability at 48 h)

basicInfo.description: NF1-associated high-grade primary MPNST patient-derived xenograft established at Washington University; primary mediastinal tumor
basicInfo.clinicalData: Sex: Male; Age at MPNST: 27 years; NF1 status: NF1; MPNST grade: High; MPNST location: mediastinum; MPNST type: primary; MPNST size: 12.6 cm; clinical status: deceased
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Division of Oncology, Washington University School of Medicine
